Description: Probationary Officer in public sector banks; RBI Grade B is the most prestigious banking services post
Entrance Exam / Pathway: IBPS PO/SO, SBI PO, RBI Grade B Written Test + Interview

Description: Assistant Section Officer, Income Tax Inspector, Auditor and other Group B & C central government posts
Entrance Exam / Pathway: SSC CGL Written Exam + Skill Test

Course Name: GATE (PSU Jobs or Higher Studies Abroad)
Description: Gateway to PSU employment (ONGC, NTPC, BHEL, GAIL) or master's admissions in Germany, Singapore, NUS
Entrance Exam / Pathway: GATE Exam (CS, ME, CE, EC, EE, BT, CH etc.)

Description: National Eligibility Test for Assistant Professor and Junior Research Fellowship; required for teaching in universities
Commissioned officer in Army, Navy or Air Force through Short Service Commission for PG holders
Agricultural and rural development banking; NABARD Grade A is prestigious for agriculture and rural finance career

Course Name: CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) Levels I, II, III
Description: Globally recognized investment management qualification; investment banking, fund management and equity research

Course Name: FRM (Financial Risk Manager) Parts I & II
Description: Risk management certification by GARP; credit risk, market risk and operational risk roles in banks and finance firms
Highest ICAI qualification; Partner in CA firms, CFO and finance leadership in any corporate sector
Super-specialty clinical training beyond MCh/DM; offered by NMC, professional bodies and leading hospitals
PMI global certification; project leadership in IT, construction, pharma and any project-based industry
Cloud platform skills for Solutions Architects, DevOps and Cloud Engineers; highly demanded in IT industry
Entrance Exam / Pathway: Online AWS / Azure / GCP Certification Exams

Description: Advanced information security qualifications; roles in cyber defence, SOC analyst, security architect

Course Name: Data Science / ML Certifications (Google / Coursera / IBM)
Description: Industry-recognized data science credentials; add-on to academic PG for analytics and AI careers
SEO, SEM, content marketing, social media advertising; marketing and brand management roles
Building and scaling one's own business; supported by T-Hub (Hyderabad), iCreate, IIM incubators and SIDBI SPEED fund
Entrance Exam / Pathway: No formal exam; accelerator / incubator applications

Description: Senior technical or functional expert role in a corporation; requires deep subject knowledge and 5-10 years' experience
Strategy advisory at McKinsey, BCG, Bain, Deloitte or Big Four; top-tier MBA or PhD + relevant experience
Policy research, market research, technology advisory on a project basis; growing gig economy opportunity
Social impact, community development, international development; TISS, IRMA and development sector degrees help

Course Name: MS / PhD Abroad (USA / UK / Canada / Australia / Germany)
Description: World-class research and teaching universities; TA/RA funding available; GRE/IELTS required for most countries

Course Name: MBA at International B-Schools (INSEAD / LBS / HBS)
Description: Global MBA at top-ranked global institutes; international career access; typically 3-5 years work experience required
Entrance Exam / Pathway: GMAT / GRE + Work Experience + Essays + Interview

Description: Funded research stay in Germany; DAAD is India's largest scholarship source for Germany; all disciplines
Fully funded Master's in European university consortium; highly competitive; all disciplines
Prestigious India-US government funded fellowship; Master's, PhD, research and teaching opportunities
